name: yeeflow-app-builder
description: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills, including documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, browser OAuth API authentication, runtime-binding lessons guardrails for dashboard summaries and filters, approval real-control validation, navigation reachability checks, requester-context getUserAttr validation, app group ID and service portal payload guards, product-team YAPK schema refresh, Datetime canonical schema guardrails, app-plan conformance and navigation guardrails, product-team YAP/YAPK schema validation, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, schema overlays, release safety scanning, package API automation, and tenant-neutral environment configuration guidance.

interface.longDescription: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying proven YAP/YAPK import-generation rules, documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, Browser OAuth-backed Yeeflow REST API authentication, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, product-team canonical YAP/YAPK schemas with a separate Codex YAPK overlay, effective YAPK schema validation, generated-final YAP contracts, approval form designer-shape validation, release safety scanning, ReplaceIds final coverage rules, workflow task URL page-type gates, advanced Yeeflow controls, reference-app UI templates, data-list system schema rules, package materialization validation, app-plan-to-implementation conformance, navigation conformance guardrails, runtime-binding lessons for dashboard Summary/filter bindings, approval real-control validation, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID and service portal payload guards, signing/API proof boundaries, policy-as-data modeling, and official plugin release management. v0.6.21-api-map.0 adds a documented Yeeflow REST API capability map while preserving OAuth login support and Yeeflow App Builder identity.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Yeeflow App Builder v0.6.21-api-map.0 to plan, generate, validate, and harden Yeeflow application packages. Before Yeeflow API work, check the REST API capability map, use only documented capabilities, check OAuth/API auth status, and prefer OAuth-backed calls. Require explicit confirmation for write capabilities and stronger confirmation for package install/import/upgrade/delete. Treat schemas, package validators, workflow validators, runtime binding checks, API acceptance, and plan-conformance checks as separate proof boundaries. Enforce dashboard Summary/ext/ReportIds bindings, filter variable consumption, approval real controls, navigation reachability, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID suitability, service portal gating, signing/API proof boundaries, and policy-as-data modeling before calling a generated app ready.
